title: Bulbophyllum medioximum

This family is a large and diverse group of flowering plants, consisting of more than 30,000 known species. This subfamily is one of the largest and most widespread groups within the Orchidaceae family. Bulbophyllum medioximum is also classified within the tribe Dendrobiinae, which is a group of orchids commonly known as "strap-leaved orchids".
